hero.headline: When your septic fails, we don't
hero.subheadline: Local New Haven crew handling pumping, repairs, and full system replacements — fast.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Every septic job — handled
services_section.subheading: From routine pumping to emergency replacements

services.title: Septic Pumping
services.description: Regular maintenance pumping to keep your system running. We handle residential and commercial tanks.

services.title: System Replacement
services.description: Full septic system installation when repairs won't cut it. New systems designed to last.

services.title: Emergency Service
services.description: When your system backs up or fails, we respond fast. Available for septic emergencies.

services.title: Repairs & Maintenance
services.description: Fixing pumps, pipes, and components to extend your system's life. Honest assessments on what needs work.

about.heading: Shoreline septic team
about.body: We're the New Haven septic crew that shows up when we say we will. One call gets you Jay and the team — not a call center.

reviews.name: Scott D.
reviews.text: Hired Lussier to replace a septic and needed it done fast. They did an excellent job and finished ahead of time. Jay and Sue were very responsive and helpful.

reviews.name: Bill D.
reviews.text: Jay handles all my septic needs. Local guy serving the Shoreline for many years. Emergency service, pumping, replacements — he handles it all.

reviews.name: Kevin G.
reviews.text: Reputable trustworthy family business. Very highly recommended!

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving New Haven & surrounding areas
service_areas.subheading: Local septic service across the shoreline

cta.heading: Need septic work? We're ready
cta.body: Call for honest pricing on pumping, repairs, or full system replacement. No surprises, just straight answers.
